name: @false00/pi-elasticsearch
description_en: Production-focused Elasticsearch automation tools for the Pi coding agent — curated tools for search, documents, indices, cluster administration, security, lifecycle, and full API reach via the official JS client and raw REST access
description_zh: 面向生产的 Pi 编码代理 Elasticsearch 自动化工具 — 搜索、文档、索引、集群管理、安全、生命周期和通过官方 JS 客户端和原始 REST 访问的完整 API 的精选工具
